hypothesis: Incorporating reaction pathway and synthesis condition data from chemical literature (e.g., precursor combinations, solvent systems, temperature profiles) into the continual pre-training corpus will enable LLMs to predict not only MOF physicochemical properties but also synthesizability scores, such that models pre-trained on synthesis-augmented corpora will outperform property-only pre-trained models on held-out experimental MOF datasets where computational hypothetical structures are systematically absent.
